seed_instruction: Provide a comprehensive review of the Netflix series "Stranger Things."
org_constraint: The review must be formatted in JSON with the following keys: "Title" (String), "Overview" (String), "Strengths" (Array), "Weaknesses" (Array), and "Conclusion" (String).
new_constraint: The review must be formatted in Markdown, including at least two level-2 headers.
instruction: Provide a comprehensive review of the Netflix series "Stranger Things." The review must be formatted in JSON with the following keys: "Title" (String), "Overview" (String), "Strengths" (Array), "Weaknesses" (Array), and "Conclusion" (String). The review must be formatted in Markdown, including at least two level-2 headers.
